key: listening17_audio_guide
text: Welcome to the city tour. My name is Mark, and I am your guide today. Our first stop is the most famous landmark in the city. The tour starts at ten in the morning and finishes at one in the afternoon. Please keep your ticket with you. At each attraction, you will have time for photos. There is a short stop at a gift shop, where you can buy a souvenir. Admission to the museum is included in your tour. Enjoy the sightseeing, and please stay with the group.

key: listening17_recorded_message
text: Thank you for calling City Tours. Our office is open from nine to six. The city bus tour leaves every hour from the main square. A full ticket is thirty dollars, and the tour takes three hours. The price includes a guide and admission to two attractions. To book a tour, please press one. To hear the times again, please press two. We hope to see you soon for a day of sightseeing.

key: Hi! I would like to book a tour, please.
text: Hi! I would like to book a tour, please.

key: Of course! We have a half-day tour and a full-day tour.
text: Of course! We have a half-day tour and a full-day tour.

key: Great. Do you have a brochure of the attractions?

key: [order-l17]
text: Elaine goes to the tour office. She would like to book a tour. She asks when the tour starts. She asks how much admission is. She takes a brochure and buys one ticket.
